auth.loginDescription: Sign in to manage your tenants, users, and more from your centralized dashboard.

teamMembers.title: Team Members
teamMembers.subtitle: Manage users and invitations for your team

invite.title: Invite User
invite.subtitle: Send an invitation to join your team. They'll receive an email with instructions to set up their account.
invite.note: Note: The user will receive an email with a link to accept the invitation and set their password. The invitation will expire in 7 days.

toast.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
